title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at LG Soft India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at LG Soft India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at LG Soft India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Mysuru-based team.

About LG Soft India:
LG Soft India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LG Soft India!
